description: Style Notebaldessarini Delmar perfume, for men, is an ideal fragrance geared towards the active young man who loves the exotic locations. Product DetailsThis exciting, fragrant expedition begins with freshness of water melon with unexpected accords of black pepper, accompanied with essential oil of angelica. A heart is presented with notes of nutmeg, clary sage and tobacco aromas. A base of the fragrance is created by woody accords of oak and Guaiac wood with suedeCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
